## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the connector contract (if adding/modifying a connector)
- [ ] dbt models tested (`dbt test` passes)
- [ ] Engine tests pass (`PYTHONPATH=. python tests/test_engine.py`)
- [ ] Docker images build successfully
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)

## Type of change

- [ ] New connector
- [ ] Pipeline/orchestration change
- [ ] dbt model change
- [ ] Infrastructure change
- [ ] Bug fix
